description: Generate staged lift/capture checklist and cribbing progression.
assumptions: Load movement is controlled and captured at each stage.
warnings: Use incident command and spotter confirmation at each lift increment.
Do not exceed equipment ratings or manufacturer instructions.
stepTemplates: Plan {stageCount} lift stage(s) at {captureIntervalIn} in intervals.
Set {liftPoints} lift point(s) and confirm equalized contact.
Cribbing layer target: {layersNeeded} layer(s) of {cribbingMaterialSizeIn} in material.
Starting clearance {startingClearanceIn} in; capture each stage before continuing.
Reassess hazards and stabilization before each next stage.

citationQueries.query: air lifting bag operations and cribbing capture intervals
shoring operations guide cribbing and lift progression
MUSAR trench rescue shoring operations guide capture and stabilization
